latest_news.headline: IRGC claims strikes on Kuwait and UAE air bases - ballistic missiles + suicide drones
latest_news.text: IRGC Navy commander Tangsiri claims 'pounded' Al-Minhad (UAE) and Ali Al-Salem (Kuwait) air bases with massive ballistic missile + suicide drone barrage. Says bases were 'origin of aggression' against Iran. UAE air defenses actively responding.

latest_news.headline: UAE air defenses responding to active missile threat
latest_news.text: UAE National Emergency Crisis and Disaster Management Authority confirms air defenses responding to missile threat. Tells residents to remain in safe locations. Direct threat to UAE territory escalates.

latest_news.headline: Putin tells Iran Moscow remains 'loyal friend and reliable partner'
latest_news.text: Putin's Nowruz message to new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and President Pezeshkian: Moscow remains 'loyal friend and reliable partner to Tehran during this difficult time.' Major geopolitical alignment signal.

latest_news.headline: UK Foreign Secretary: Iran strikes on Gulf 'reckless' - wants 'swift resolution'
latest_news.text: UK Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper calls Iran's Gulf strikes 'reckless', says UK wants 'swift resolution' and regional stability. Reiterates UK will offer defensive support but 'will not be drawn into wider conflict.'

latest_news.headline: Trump: Strait of Hormuz must be protected 'by other nations who use it'
latest_news.text: Trump says Hormuz protection should fall on 'other nations who use it' - further evidence of US disengagement from coalition-building for Hormuz. Pushes burden to Asian/European importers.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 70% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 22 Hour 06 UTC. ~80%+ (IMMINENT via coupling). 1,024+ killed, 1M+ displaced. Beirut strikes continue. Ground fighting in south (Khiam). 2 IDF soldiers wounded by mortar from Lebanon. Hezbollah fires hundreds of missiles since Mar 2. IRGC-Hezbollah joint strikes. Lebanon gov rebukes Iran over IRGC joint operations (Bloomberg). CNN: 'This time it's different' - heavier bombardment than 2024 war. Updated 2026-03-22T06:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 22 Hour 06 UTC. ~2% base, ~17% with coupling (DETERRENT). No new incidents. 3 Patriot batteries at Incirlik. Stable. Updated 2026-03-22T06:00:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

Day 22 Hour 06 UTC. ~42% base (CRITICAL). US-brokered Ukraine/Russia talks continue in Florida (Reuters) - more sessions Sunday. Russia continues rejecting ceasefire, intensified spring offensive prep (ISW). Deadliest day 2026 still holding (1,610 Russian KIA). Ukraine FM Sybiha: will increase scale of deep strikes on Russia. latest_news.headline: Putin's forces suffer DEADLIEST day of 2026 - 1,610 killed in 24h
latest_news.text: Russian forces suffer deadliest day of 2026: 1,610 killed in past 24 hours. Total Russian casualties since Feb 2022 now approximately 1,285,700. Fighting intense despite peace talk pauses.

latest_news.headline: Ukrainian drone swarms target Moscow overnight
latest_news.text: Swarms of Ukrainian drones targeted Moscow overnight, mayor confirms. Russian air defense intercepted attacks. Continued deep-strike capability demonstration.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 26% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 22 Hour 06 UTC. ~29% (ELEVATED). Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 24 (Saudi/Qatar/Turkey request). TTP also truce. No new fighting. Post-Eid resumption feared Mar 25. Removed ceasefire_breach_claim (ceasefire restored). Updated 2026-03-22T06:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

Iran Armed Forces: if power plants hit, ALL US energy infra + IT + desalination facilities targeted

Natanz nuclear facility STRUCK AGAIN (2nd strike) — IAEA: no radiation, Iran: 400kg HEU remains
KATZ: Strikes to 'intensify significantly' this week
Hormuz effectively closed — 1,000+ cargo ships blocked, oil at $112/barrel
Bahrain: 143 missiles, 242 drones intercepted total. Saudi: 47 drones in single night
Kuwait refinery hit AGAIN by Iranian drones — 730k bpd facility ablaze
DPRK 15th SPA Session convenes TODAY — constitutional revision expected

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 06 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Ukraine/US talks continue in Florida. Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA: no radiation at Natanz/Dimona. ESCALATION: Trump 48-HR ULTIMATUM (deadline ~22hrs). 100+ wounded in Dimona/Arad strikes. Iran: if power plants hit, ALL US energy infra targeted. Netanyahu: 'continue striking on all fronts.' Katz: intensify significantly. NET: RECIPROCAL ESCALATION intensifying. Ultimatum deadline approaching with no compliance signals from Iran. Risk of major escalation (power plant strikes) within 24 hours.

latest_news.headline: Bahrain intercepts 2 more missiles - total now 143 missiles, 242 drones since war began
latest_news.text: Bahrain defense forces intercept and destroy 2 more Iranian missiles. Total since Feb 28: 143 missiles and 242 drones. Sustained Iranian bombardment continues.

latest_news.headline: Saudi Arabia intercepts 47 Iranian drones - 38 in just 3 hours
latest_news.text: Saudi Ministry of Defense reports intercepting 47 Iranian drones over eastern region. 38 drones concentrated in a 3-hour window - heavy sustained bombardment.

latest_news.headline: DPRK Supreme People's Assembly 15th Session convenes in Pyongyang
latest_news.text: 1st Session of 15th Supreme People's Assembly convenes in Pyongyang (Mar 22). Workers Party won all 687 seats (99.93%). Constitutional revision expected. Kim Yo Jong influence rising with 70% deputy reshuffle.

latest_news.headline: Kuwait Mina al-Ahmadi refinery hit by second wave of Iranian drones
latest_news.text: Two waves of Iranian drones hit Kuwait's Mina al-Ahmadi refinery (one of Middle East's largest, 730k bpd capacity). Fire sparked. Second strike on this facility.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 05:00 UTC). CRITICAL: Trump 48hr ultimatum deadline ~22hrs (~00:53 CET Mar 24). Natanz STRUCK AGAIN — Iran confirms, Israel denies. Katz: strikes to 'intensify significantly.' Iran reciprocal threat: if power plants hit, ALL US energy infra targeted. 1,000+ ships blocked at Hormuz. 1,024 killed in Lebanon. NET: RECIPROCAL ESCALATION spiraling with ultimatum deadline approaching. No diplomatic off-ramps visible. Israel-Iran conflict at 'halfway' stage per IDF Chief Zamir.
de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 06 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Ukraine/US talks continue in Florida. Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA: no radiation at Natanz/Dimona. ESCALATION: Trump 48-HR ULTIMATUM (deadline ~22hrs). 100+ wounded in Dimona/Arad strikes. Iran: if power plants hit, ALL US energy infra targeted. Katz: strikes to 'intensify significantly.' NET: RECIPROCAL ESCALATION spiraling. Power plant strikes possible within 24 hours if ultimatum expires without Hormuz opening.
